Question: Find the ⓐ volume and ⓑ surface area of rectangular solid with the: length $$8$$ feet, width $$9$$ feet, and height $$11$$ feet.
o3 Answer:
For a rectangular solid (rectangular prism)

• Volume V = ℓ w h  
• Surface area SA = 2(ℓ w + ℓ h + w h)

Given
ℓ = 8 ft, w = 9 ft, h = 11 ft

a) Volume  
V = 8 ft × 9 ft × 11 ft  
= 72 ft² × 11 ft  
= 792 ft³

b) Surface area  
SA = 2(ℓ w + ℓ h + w h)  
= 2[(8 ft)(9 ft) + (8 ft)(11 ft) + (9 ft)(11 ft)]  
= 2(72 ft² + 88 ft² + 99 ft²)  
= 2(259 ft²)  
= 518 ft²

Answers  
a) Volume = 792 cubic feet  
b) Surface area = 518 square feet
